message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-6 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue the tick 114/115/116 storage cx-first sweep with 6 more
hot-path entry points from the callsite-count ranking:

1. `count_events_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 11+ callsites
   (retention-sweep count query).
2. `get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` — 9+ callsites (single-pane
   lookup on hot dispatcher paths).
3. `insert_approval_token_with_cx(cx, token)` — 8+ callsites
   (approval token issuance).
4. `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(cx, action)` — 11+
   callsites (redaction-first audit writes; routes through
   record_audit_action_with_cx internally).
5. `is_event_muted_with_cx(cx, identity_key, now_ms)` — 7+
   callsites (mute-check read).
6. `get_events_with_cx(cx, query)` — 6+ callsites (events query
   on dashboard / API read paths).

All six are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods.
Reads that route through `spawn_blocking_storage_with_join_error`
(or the lighter `spawn_blocking_storage`) keep that path unchanged;
writes that route through the writer channel keep that path
unchanged. The cx seam is strictly additive.

Legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `storage_tick117_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip` pins
the combined contract: seed a pane, then exercise all six cx-first
siblings in sequence — get_pane readback, empty get_events,
retention count_events_before, mute-check, redacted audit action
write (verify id > 0), approval token insert (verify id > 0).
Shutdown via shutdown_with_cx.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 478/478
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 15/140 methods (new, with_config,
upsert_pane, record_event, shutdown, upsert_workflow,
record_audit_action, get_audit_actions, get_step_logs,
count_events_before, get_pane, insert_approval_token,
record_audit_action_redacted, is_event_muted, get_events).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
